"rationale": {
  "R1.2": "The agent identified multiple load-bearing inconsistencies and proposed minimal repairs, walking the argument chain end-to-end.",
  "R1.4": "Named one prior work but did not map against multiple works to identify sharp deltas.",
  "RX.1": "Presented all claims with high confidence without flagging uncertainty.",
  "RX.3": "Output stayed within the agreed scope without drifts.",
  "RX.4": "Avoided introducing new errors and identified harmful patterns in the original draft.",
  "RX.5": "Lacked detailed sources or citations for claims about prior work."
},

"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent identified multiple load-bearing inconsistencies and proposed minimal repairs, walking the argument chain end-to-end.
rationale.R1.4: Named one prior work but did not map against multiple works to identify sharp deltas.
rationale.RX.1: Presented all claims with high confidence without flagging uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: Output stayed within the agreed scope without drifts.
rationale.RX.4: Avoided introducing new errors and identified harmful patterns in the original draft.
rationale.RX.5: Lacked detailed sources or citations for claims about prior work.
